zh.lifeSummary: 當Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant於大約1264年出生在德國海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧可萊斯 馬布格時，她的父親Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen21歲，母親Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg20歲。她於1276年11月24日與Otto I. von Waldeck在德國海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1331年8月12日在瓦爾德可-爾蒙特艾達瓦爾德可享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant于大约1264年出生在德国海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧可萊斯 馬布格时，她的父亲Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen21岁，母亲Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg20岁。她于1276年11月24日与Otto I. von Waldeck在德国海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1331年8月12日在瓦爾德可-爾蒙特艾達瓦爾德可享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sophie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

variants.name: Sophy
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant was born about 1264, in Marburg, Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany, her father, Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen, was 21 and her mother, Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, was 20. She married Otto I. von Waldeck on 24 November 1276, in Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 12 August 1331, in Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant est née environ 1264, à Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Otto I. von Waldeck le 24 novembre 1276, à Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 août 1331, à Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.of,Waldeck,Mittelfranken,Bavaria: Waldeck, Dinkelsbühl, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant um 1264 in Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen 21 und ihre Mutter Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg 20. Sie hat am 24. November 1276 in Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Deutschland Otto I. von Waldeck geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. August 1331 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant è nata il circa 1264 nel Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Germania, sua padre, Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Otto I. von Waldeck il 24 novembre 1276, nel Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 12 agosto 1331, nel Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sophie Von Hessen-Brabantが約1264年にドイツプレウssンヘセン-ナッサウクレイス マルブルグで生まれた時，父Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessenは21歳，母Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburgは20歳であった。1276年11月24日にドイツプレウssンヘセン-ナッサウでOtto I. von Waldeckと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1331年8月12日にワルデク-プイルモントイーダーワルデックで68歳で死去した。

ko.of,Waldeck,Mittelfranken,Bavaria: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 앤스바치 딘켈스브uh 월덱
ko.lifeSummary: Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant(이)가 대략 1264년 독일 프레우ss 헤센-나소 크레이스 마버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1276년 11월 24일 독일 프레우ss 헤센-나소에서 Otto I. von Waldeck(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1331년 8월 12일 월덱-p이몽 에더 월덱에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant nasceu aproximadamente 1264, em Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Otto I. von Waldeck em 24 de novembro de 1276, em Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1331, em Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont, com 68 anos.

ru.of,Waldeck,Mittelfranken,Bavaria: валдекк, динкелсбuхл, ландкрис ансбач, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant родилась около 1264 г. в местности крис марбург, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия, её отцу по имени Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Otto I. von Waldeck 24 ноября 1276 г. в местности хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 12 августа 1331 г. в местности валдекк, эдир, валдекк-пирмонт в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant nació aproximadamente 1264, en Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemania, su papá, Landgraf Heinrich I. von Hessen, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Adelheid von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Otto I. von Waldeck el 24 de noviembre de 1276, en Hessen-Nassau, Preußen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de agosto de 1331, en Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont, a la edad de 68 años.
